name: Faulty machine from subcontractor hurt me at job in Draper, sue them?

mainEntity.name: Faulty machine from subcontractor hurt me at job in Draper, sue them?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, third-party claim against subcontractor alongside comp for full damages.[1][3] Comp limits employer suit.[1] Key factors: prove negligence; no comp offset issues; pain/suffering included.[3] Preserve evidence, notify promptly, attorney files personal injury suit.[1] Bigger recovery potential.
